name: Waltz Flight Assistant
description: Adds Waltz Flight Assistant search and booking tools backed by the hosted flight backend.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the hosted flight agent, for example https://flights.example.com

authToken.description: Optional bearer token sent to the hosted flight agent

openclawId.description: Preferred stable OpenClaw user id forwarded to the hosted flight agent

userId.description: Legacy alias for openclawId. Prefer openclawId for new installs.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for calls to the hosted flight agent

baseUrl.label: Waltz Flight URL
baseUrl.help: Hosted base URL for the Waltz Flight Assistant backend.

authToken.label: Bearer Token
authToken.help: Optional bearer token for protected hosted deployments.
